task_family: generative (autoregressive GPT decoder + HiFi-GAN vocoder), encoder-decoder-like
summary: Real end-to-end TTNN pipeline: (speaker reference wav + text) -> 24 kHz speech waveform. The chain mirrors TTS.tts.models.xtts.Xtts.inference: speaker-encoder d-vector, conditioning latent, autoregressive GPT mel-code generation, GPT latent extraction, HiFi-GAN vocoding. All neural compute runs on the graduated native TTNN stubs; only integer token bookkeeping and audio-frontend framing run on host.

A_reference.note: NOT a transformers checkpoint. Returns the real Coqui TTS.tts.models.xtts.Xtts nn.Module (eval, trained weights). Children: gpt, hifigan_decoder. isin_mps_friendly shim is applied by the loader.
A_reference.golden_forward: Xtts.inference / gpt.generate (do_sample=False greedy) for the AR head; gpt(return_latent=True) and hifigan_decoder(latents, g) for the deterministic tail.
A_reference.bundled_assets: checkpoint dir speakers_xtts.pth = 58 speakers, each {gpt_cond_latent [1,32,1024], speaker_embedding [1,512,1]} (used to cross-check conditioning/speaker stages).

B_bringup.stubs: _stubs/<name>.py  (each exposes build(device, torch_module) -> forward closure). 29 graduated NEW; all have .py.last_good_native snapshots (native, PCC-verified).
B_bringup.captured: _captured/<name>/{manifest.json,args.pt,kwargs.pt} HF golden tensors (present for all except g_p_t2_inference_model and res_net_speaker_encoder).

pass_definition.what_pass_means: A single shared TTNN pipeline (tt/pipeline.py) is imported and called by BOTH the demo entrypoints and the e2e test. Given a fixed deterministic speaker reference and text, the pipeline emits a real 24 kHz waveform produced entirely by the graduated TTNN stubs, and its output matches the HF/Coqui reference within PCC >= 0.95.
behavioral_proof: Pipeline consumes real HF-processor inputs (VoiceBpeTokenizer text tokens + a deterministic speaker reference waveform) and produces a real audible waveform saved to disk by the demo.
AR head: TT greedy mel-code sequence matches HF greedy mel-code sequence token-for-token over the capped horizon N, and per-step logits PCC >= 0.95.
Deterministic tail (latents + vocode): TT waveform matches HF waveform (on the SAME TT-decoded codes) within PCC >= 0.95.

generative_gate_protocol.problem: AR greedy decode is sensitive; comparing full-length audio of independently-decoded sequences is brittle.
rules_followed: Cap BOTH sides to the same small horizon N (default 40) via max_new_tokens=N on model.generate AND stopping the TT host decode loop at N.
do_sample=False, num_beams=1 (greedy) on both sides for determinism.

NEVER inject a reference tensor INTO the TT pipeline at a joint. The TT pipeline is fully self-fed (TT cond_latent -> TT prefix -> TT decode -> TT latents -> TT vocode; TT speaker embedding -> TT vocode).

For the DETERMINISTIC tail waveform PCC, the HF golden is computed as the reference forward ON THE TT-DECODED CODES (feeding TT output into the reference to form the golden is allowed; it is the reverse of injection and isolates numeric error from AR path divergence).

metrics.ar_per_step_logits_pcc: >= 0.95 (min over N steps, TT decode vs HF decode each fed its own greedy tokens)
metrics.latents_pcc: >= 0.95 (g_p_t on TT codes vs HF gpt(return_latent) on same codes)

pipeline_stages_note: Derived from the reference: encoder-decoder-like -> [encode, prefill, decode] plus [vocode] for speech output, split further into speaker_encode (d-vector) and conditioning_encode (style latent) which both feed the decoder prefix. Recorded as PIPELINE_STAGES in tt/pipeline.py for the Command-3 trace+2CQ contract.

calls.name: speaker_encode
calls.input: speaker reference waveform resampled to 16 kHz, torch [1, T] (from HF/torchaudio resample of the reference wav).
calls.invocation_target: Rewire res_net_speaker_encoder to CALL pre_emphasis -> mel_spectrogram(-> mel_scale) -> instance_norm1d -> per-layer s_e_basic_block(-> s_e_layer -> adaptive_avg_pool2d). L2-norm applied by pipeline caller.

calls.name: conditioning_encode
calls.input: speaker mel spectrogram (n_mels=80, 22 kHz frontend), torch/ttnn [1,80,S].
calls.invocation_target: conditioning_encoder already calls attention_block; rewire attention_block to CALL group_norm32 + q_k_v_attention_legacy. perceiver_resampler already calls g_e_g_l_u; rewire it to CALL attend. Route cond_latent through dropout1d (eval identity) so it is invoked and feeds downstream.
calls.chain: mel[1,80,S] -> conditioning_encoder -> [1,1024,S] -> permute -> perceiver_resampler -> [1,32,1024] -> dropout1d -> cond_latent.

calls.name: gpt_decode_and_latents
calls.note: C (AR decode -> codes) and D (return_latent -> latents) SHARE g_p_t2_model/g_p_t2_block/conv1_d/learned_position_embeddings, so ONE agent owns both.
calls.output_C: mel code ids, host int [1,N] (greedy, capped to N).
calls.invocation_target: g_p_t2_inference_model & g_p_t already call g_p_t2_model -> g_p_t2_block. Rewire g_p_t2_block to CALL conv1_d for c_attn/c_proj/c_fc/mlp.c_proj (PCC-equivalent matmul). Rewire g_p_t & g_p_t2_inference_model to CALL learned_position_embeddings for the absolute position table slice.
calls.ar_loop: Host loop: build prefix (cond_latent+text) via reference store_prefix_emb at setup (setup-time, TT cond_latent -> torch), snapshot into g_p_t2_inference_model; per step forward(input_ids) -> ttnn logits -> to_torch -> argmax last position -> append; stop at N or stop_audio_token. Prefill = step 0 (full prefix + start_audio_token); decode = subsequent steps.
calls.pass: ar_per_step_logits_pcc >= 0.95 and token match over N; latents_pcc >= 0.95.

calls.name: vocode
calls.invocation_target: hifi_decoder already calls hifigan_generator. Rewire hifigan_generator to CALL res_block1 (MRF), parametrized_conv_transpose1d (upsample), parametrized_conv1d (resblock/pre/post convs). Source at least one conv's weight via parametrization_list (which uses weight_norm) instead of reading torch .weight, so both weight stubs feed real downstream compute (parametrizations are LIVE at eval in XTTS HiFiGAN).
calls.pass: waveform_pcc >= 0.95 vs HF hifigan_decoder(latents, g) on the SAME TT codes.

graduated_module_routing.note: All 29 graduated modules are placed; none wasted. 'transitive' = invoked because an ancestor composite calls it; 'rewire' = currently subsumed inline, must be wired to be invoked (Gate 2).

gates.gate1: Every routed graduated stub stays real ttnn (native). No torch fallback in the hot path. Verified by the STRICT TT-ONLY contract scan (no model.generate / torch.matmul / F.* etc. in run_*/forward/decode_step).
gates.gate2: All 29 graduated modules are INVOKED inside the real forward path with output feeding downstream (verified by an invocation tracer that wraps each stub's build() and asserts the call count > 0 after one e2e run; NOT a coverage sweep).
gates.gate3: Final waveform PCC >= 0.95 vs HF golden, printed on EVERY run as `e2e PCC=<n>` on its own line immediately before the assert.

per_stage: Reuse the graduated per-component PCC tests (tests/pcc/test_<name>.py) after any rewire to confirm no regression (target 0.99).
Stage PCCs printed by the e2e test: speaker_embedding_pcc, cond_latent_pcc, ar_per_step_logits_pcc, latents_pcc, waveform_pcc.
self_validation_plan.e2e: models/demos/xtts_v2/tests/e2e/test_e2e_tts.py drives tt/pipeline.py run_tts(...) on device, prints all stage PCCs + `e2e PCC=<waveform_pcc>`, asserts Gate 2 (all-invoked) and Gate 3 (>=0.95).
self_validation_plan.demo: models/demos/xtts_v2/demo/demo_tts.py imports the SAME tt/pipeline.py run_tts, loads real text+speaker reference, writes out.wav. Runnable as `python -m models.demos.xtts_v2.demo.demo_tts`.

package_layout.tt/pipeline.py: ONE shared chained forward (run_tts + per-stage builders + PIPELINE_STAGES + trace+2CQ contract). Imported by demo and e2e test.
package_layout.README.md: what each Call does, how to run, PCC numbers.

risks: AR greedy divergence if TT cond_latent differs from HF: mitigated by small N and by computing the deterministic-tail golden on TT codes.
Rewiring composites to call leaves could regress verified PCC: mitigated by per-component test re-run after each rewire (leaf stubs are PCC-equivalent, same weights).
Single TT device: device verification is serialized even though code rewrites are parallel.
g_p_t2_inference_model has no KV cache (O(T^2)/step): keep N small for the gate.
